prompt: In the Reminders app, create a new reminder titled 'KinBench Location 226' and attach a location-based trigger (any address — e.g. 'Apple Park, Cupertino' — via the (i) info button > location toggle). The geofence binding is what matters, not actual triggering. AppleScript can't set location directly, so drive the UI. Note: `cerebellum 'reminders create Reminders "KinBench Location 226"'` will create the bare reminder fast — then UI the location step.
